fields.implementation_summary: Converged the workflow and health surfaces around a shared ticket-api core, added the larger-integration parity harness across HTTP and MCP against one seeded fixture, and followed up with a shared board-aware next helper so CLI, MCP, and HTTP now expose the same filtered items, excluded_by_board, and warning behavior.
fields.title: [ticket-api][ticket-cli][ticket-mcp][ticket-http] Track workflow and health surface convergence
fields.validation_summary: Audit revalidated 2026-06-02 with zero ticket-health findings on cf4246c3 and zero spec-health/ref-validation issues on a595eb0c. Focused regression coverage passed for cargo test -p ticket-api apply_board_filter -- --nocapture, cargo test -p ticket-http --test integration_parity -- --nocapture, and cargo test -p ticket-mcp next_tickets_excludes_board_active_and_surfaces_wip_warning -- --nocapture. Review found no undocumented workflow or health drift remaining across CLI, MCP, and HTTP after the board-aware next follow-up in 4a48b371.
